# CircleCI CLI

Publish orb versions to the CircleCI orb registry.

To publish a specific version:
  circleci orb publish <path> <ns>/<orb>@<version>

To promote a dev version to a stable semver:
  circleci orb publish promote <ns>/<orb>@dev:<label> major|minor|patch

To increment the latest stable version and publish:
  circleci orb publish increment <path> <ns>/<orb> major|minor|patch

## Usage

`circleci orb publish <command> [flags]`

## Available Commands

| Command     | Description                                  |
| ----------- | -------------------------------------------- |
| `increment` | Increment and publish a new orb version      |
| `promote`   | Promote a dev orb version to a stable semver |

## Inherited Flags

| Flag                  | Description                                                  |
| --------------------- | ------------------------------------------------------------ |
| `-c, --config string` | path to config file (default: ~/.config/circleci/config.yml) |
| `--debug`             | enable debug logging                                         |
| `-q, --quiet`         | suppress informational output; data on stdout is unaffected  |

## Examples

- Publish a specific version: 
  `circleci orb publish orb.yml myorg/my-orb@1.0.0`
- Publish a dev version: 
  `circleci orb publish orb.yml myorg/my-orb@dev:my-branch`
- Promote a dev version to a patch release: 
  `circleci orb publish promote myorg/my-orb@dev:my-branch patch`
- Increment major version and publish: 
  `circleci orb publish increment orb.yml myorg/my-orb major`

## Learn More

- Use `circleci <command> <subcommand> --help` for more information about a command.
- Read the manual at <https://circleci.com/docs/local-cli>
- Support at <https://github.com/CircleCI-Public/circleci-cli/issues>
